creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 166373
Proposed patch (since 402913 revision)

Patch to update games/pioneer port from 20151130 to 20160129 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/compare/20151130...20160129

- Remove patch, which fixed by upstream

The build tested on FreeBSD 9.3 and 10.2 amd64.

The saved games from previous version is not compatible.
